summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CIVIX hyperlocal services platform with focus on AI Intelligence Layer and 37 services requirement. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core functionality working but Select component errors affecting filters.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.error_details: SelectItem components missing proper value props, causing filter dropdowns to fail

integration_issues.issue: Category filter dropdown not accessible due to Select component errors
Urgency indicator not clearly visible in UI despite backend detecting urgency correctly

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Stats API correctly shows 37 total services
AI Intelligent Search API working perfectly
Hinglish query 'bijli band hai' correctly returns electrical services with urgency
Hinglish query 'biryani khaana hai' correctly returns restaurant services
WhatsApp onboarding API extracting business data correctly
Category filters working at API level (restaurant: 5, electrical: 3, plumbing: 3)
Landing page showing 37+ services stats correctly
Smart search functionality working and redirecting to services page
AI search correctly detecting categories for Hinglish queries
Trust score and vouches system working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Select component errors in Services.jsx - SelectItem components need proper value props. This is preventing category/area/rating filters from working in the UI. The backend filtering works perfectly, but the frontend Select dropdowns are broken due to missing value props.
